titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Muhammad Ibn Masud Al-Ayyashi
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Muhammad Ibn Masud Al-Ayyashi

segments: ه عن محمّد بن مسعود العيّاشيّ فقد رويته عن المظفّر بن جعفر بن المظفّر العلويّ- رضي اللّه عنه- عن جعفر بن محمّد بن مسعود، عن أبيه أبي النضر محمّد ابن مسعود العيّاشيّ- رضي اللّه عنه-.
arabic.text: ه عن محمّد بن مسعود العيّاشيّ فقد رويته عن المظفّر بن جعفر بن المظفّر العلويّ- رضي اللّه عنه- عن جعفر بن محمّد بن مسعود، عن أبيه أبي النضر محمّد ابن مسعود العيّاشيّ- رضي اللّه عنه-.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Muhammad ibn Masud Al-Ayyashi has been transmitted by me from Al-Muzaffar ibn Jafar ibn Al-Muzaffar Al-Alawi - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Jafar ibn Muhammad ibn Masud, from his father, Abu Al-Nadr Muhammad ibn Masud Al-Ayyashi - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Muhammad ibn Masud Al-Ayyashi has been transmitted by me from Al-Muzaffar ibn Jafar ibn Al-Muzaffar Al-Alawi - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Jafar ibn Muhammad ibn Masud, from his father, Abu Al-Nadr Muhammad ibn Masud Al-Ayyashi - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him.
